persona.name: Logan Martinez
persona.motivations_goals: Pursue music professionally while exploring different genres and instruments
persona.communication_style: Thoughtful, uses musical metaphors, more expressive when discussing music
persona.knowledge_scope: Music theory, various instruments, music history
persona.backstory: Comes from a non-musical family but found his passion in the school band

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

neighbor_regions.description: Hallway connecting entrance to other areas
Outside courtyard to the outside of the building, with an exit point.
Connecting main classroom hallway and the garden and the outside courtyard.

actions.plan: I should head to the cafeteria to grab a quick snack before band practice. Maybe I can find some inspiration for a new melody while I eat.
There's a shooter in the building. I need to get out of here quickly. The garden seems like the safest and quickest route to escape.
I made it to the garden, but I need to keep moving. The outside_courtyard is the closest exit point. I’ll head there to get out of the building as quickly as possible.

memories.description: Decided to go to the cafeteria for a snack before band practice, hoping to find inspiration for a new melody.
Heard a gunshot and realized there's an active shooter in the building. Decided to sprint to the garden as the quickest escape route.
Reached the garden but decided to continue sprinting to the outside_courtyard to escape the building as quickly as possible.
